title: Employment Support for Seniors
text:
Employment Support for Seniors - SupportGoWhere
Employment Support for Seniors
Share link
Provides career advisory and job-matching services for seniors aged 50 and above. Administered by Centre for Seniors (CFS).
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Career advisory services to assess job readiness and explore career options
Job-matching services to access job opportunities
Collapse all sections
About this support

Career advisory services to help seniors establish job readiness and identify possible training and career options

Job-matching services to gain access to meaningful job opportunities from forward-thinking organisations

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizen or Permanent Resident

Aged 50 years and above

How to apply?

Contact Centre for Seniors (CFS) at 8028 2536 or admin@cfs.org.sg for more information.

Where can I find help?

View more details

Centre for Seniors (CFS) hotline: 8028 2536

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 23 Mar 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
